text: enter enter enter should go through all the additional dialogs after aim creation. currently modals appear at the same time. Fix that
description: and enter does not (confirm and close the modal in the foreground).

status.comment: Verified-in-code 2026-06-27: after aim creation, list-store.ts:775 calls modalStore.openConnectionDetailsModal. The reported 'modals appear at the same time / enter doesn't advance through them sequentially' bug needs interactive repro to confirm current behavior before fixing.
